final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing product shot for a luxury perfume e-commerce hero visual.

Style/medium: high-end product photography, editorial fragrance campaign aesthetic
Composition: centered product shot, slightly elevated camera angle, medium focal length, shallow depth of field isolating the bottle
Subject: elegant perfume bottle with clean glass surface and refined silhouette
Scene/backdrop: black velvet fabric surface, scattered golden glitter particles around the bottle, dark void background
Lighting/mood: single spotlight from above creating dramatic chiaroscuro, strong contrast between highlight and deep shadow, mysterious and luxurious nocturnal atmosphere
Color palette: deep black as dominant base, warm gold accents from glitter, subtle reflections on glass
Materials/textures: soft plush velvet pile, fine golden shimmer particles, smooth glass surface with light refraction
Avoid: flat lighting, overexposed highlights, cluttered composition, generic stock photo aesthetic, watermark
